players.name: Patrick Beach
players.note: Born and raised in western Sydney; father Mark an amateur goalkeeper, mother Jo a softball player, no documented foreign heritage.

players.name: Alessandro Circati
players.note: Born in Fidenza; father Gianfranco (ex-pro footballer) and mother Teresa both Italian, family moved to Perth when he was one.

players.name: Harry Souttar
players.note: Born in Luthermuir, Scotland, to Scottish father Jack (ex-Brechin City player) and Australian mother Heather, born in Port Hedland.

players.name: Cameron Burgess
players.note: Born in Portlethen, Scotland; family (including footballer father Stuart and grandfather Campbell Forsyth) emigrated to Perth when he was 11.

players.name: Jacob Italiano
players.note: Born in Perth to parents of Italian descent; holds dual Australian-Italian citizenship.

players.name: Jordan Bos
players.note: Born in Melbourne; Dutch father Jacco relocated from the Netherlands in 1997 and met Australian mother Sandra.

players.name: Connor Metcalfe
players.note: Born in Newcastle, NSW; no documented foreign parental heritage found.

players.name: Aiden O'Neill
players.note: Born in Brisbane; holds Northern Irish citizenship via his father's side (descent), but father not documented as foreign-born — kept Australia per the parent-must-be-foreign-born rule.

players.name: Paul Okon-Engstler
players.note: Born in Belgium while father Paul Okon (Australian, ex-Socceroo, of Italian/German descent) played there; mother is Cuban.

players.name: Nestory Irankunda
players.note: Born in a refugee camp in Kigoma, Tanzania, after his Burundian parents fled civil war; moved to Perth as an infant.

players.name: Mohamed Touré
players.note: Born in a refugee camp in Conakry, Guinea, to Liberian parents Amara and Mawa Touré who fled the Liberian civil war; family moved to Australia in 2004.
